title: remove options from create/run that we cannot support

comments.body: The changes LGTM.  Do have a question though.  If these are supported by Docker, do we need to document somewhere that we don't support them?
We should document in the man pages that we can not support them at this time. I thought there was a chance we could get the --ip and --ip6 support in CNI?
@rhatdan Given that we're still waiting on the iptables plugin to merge, I wouldn't count on that being any time soon
LGTM, a shame that we have to do not implemented though.
